productDescription: High-purity electrolytic copper cathode (99.99% Cu), produced via pyrometallurgical smelting and electrolytic refining. Used as feedstock for wire drawing and PCB manufacturing.

productDescription: Monocrystalline silicon wafer, 300mm diameter, p-type, CZ-grown. Used as substrate for semiconductor fabrication.

productDescription: Epoxy molding compound (EMC) for semiconductor encapsulation, silica-filled, low-stress formulation.

productDescription: Battery-grade lithium carbonate (Li2CO3, 99.5% purity), extracted from brine operations. Precursor for lithium-ion battery cathode materials.

productDescription: Bottle-grade PET resin pellets suitable for thermoforming electronic component trays and blister packaging.

productDescription: Palladium electrolyte solution for connector plating, concentration 10g Pd/L. Used in lead-free connector finishing.

productDescription: Alkali-aluminosilicate glass sheet, 0.7mm thickness, chemically strengthened. Used as cover glass for smartphones and tablets.
